raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet Jonatans to ne bij
Dsirdejs/ kad wianna Tehws tohe
Laudis bij aplahdejs/ un wiisch
tfsteepc fawa Sisla Gallu/ kas
winna Rohkā bija/ un eemehrze
to weenâ Medus Gabbalā/ un
likke fawu Rohku atkat pee Mut-
tes/ tad tappe winna Azzis
Skaidras.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad atbildeja weens Wihrs
no teem Laudim/ un fazzija:
Taws Tehws irr tohs Laudis gau-
schi aplahdejs/ fazzidams: No-
lahdets laid irr tas Wihrs/ kas
Schodeen jeb ko ehd/ un tee Lau-
dis irr nogurrnschi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Jonatans:
Mans Tehws irr to Semm fa-
jauzis/ raugajt jelle/ ka mannas
Azzis irr skaidras tappufchas/
ka es makkeniht no fcha Meddus
efinu baudijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Zeek wairak/ kad tee Lau-
dis buhtu ehdin ehduſchi no ta
Laupijuma fawn Eenaidneeku/
fo tee atradduschi/bet nu ta Kan-
ſchana prett teem Wilistereem ne
irr leelaka tappusi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tatschu tai Deena kawe
tee tohs Wilisterus no Mikma-
fa lihds Ajalonam/ un tee Laudis
pee kuſſe tohti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad taifijahs tee Laudis
us to Laupitchanu/ un nehine A-
wis un Wehrfchus un Telfus/
un kawe tohs us Semmi/ un tee
Laudis ehde tohs ar Affintim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad tappe Saulam find-
dinahts un fazzihts: Reds/ tee
Laudis apgrehtojahs prett to
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "KUNGII Affint ehſdamt/ un
fazzija: Juhs effat pahri dar
ſchi/ welleet man Schodeen we-
leelu Akmini fchurp/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wehl fazzija Saulis:
ta fchurp un turp starp teem L-
dim/ un fakkajt us teem: Neſ-
pce man ikkatrs fawu Wehrft/
ikkatrs fawn Awi/ un nokau-
tetju/ un ehdeet/ un ne apgre-
jeetees prett to KUNGII ar A-
nim ehſdaint. Tad wedde w
Laudis ikkatrs fawn Wehrft/
wā Rohkā Nakti/ un nokau-
tehs tur.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad ustatfija Sauls ta
KUNGAM weenu Altari. Sc-
bija tas pirmais Altaris/
wiisch tam KUNGAM darr
"
    },
    {
      "n": 36,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Pehz fazzija Sauls: d-
finiees teem Wilistereem pak
Nakti/ un aplanpifim tohs/
kans Gaffina mettahs/ un ne
lizzinasim ne weenu Wibru
teem. Tee fazzija: Darri wi-
fas tawahm Azzim labbi pat-
Bet tas Preesteris fazzija: L-
mehs fchurp pee Deewa kla-
nahkam.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 37,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad waizaja Sauls D-
wu: Buhs man teem Wili-
reem pakkatdsibtees/ Arrig
tohs dohti Israēta Rohkā? Q-
wiisch tam ne atbildeja tai Dee-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 38,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Sauls: No-
zeet fchurp no wiſahm Lau-
Stuhrehin/ un atſihsteet/ un ra-
gajt/ pee ka tee Grehki irr fchi-
brifschani.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 39,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo tik teefscham ka t
KUNG
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
